tools.name: metamesh.context
tools.description: Compact snapshot of the MetaMesh gateway: active tool count, top categories, payment/billing status, last discovery. Best first call for context.

tools.name: metamesh.search_tools
tools.description: Search the catalog of 13k+ MCP tools by keyword. Returns concise matches (name, category, description). Use this instead of listing all tools.

tools.name: metamesh.tool_info
tools.description: Detailed info for a specific catalog tool: description, category, trust/security score, state, source.

tools.name: metamesh.metrics
tools.description: Usage analytics: total tools, calls, success rate and recent error counts. Read-only.

tools.name: metamesh.discovery_status
tools.description: Control/observability: status of the registry discovery engine (active tools, last run, pages fetched).

tools.name: metamesh.health
tools.description: Gateway health: database connectivity, payment configuration and feature flags.

tools.name: stripe.get_stripe_account_info
tools.description: This will get the account info for the logged in Stripe account.

tools.name: stripe.create_refund
tools.description: This tool will refund a payment intent in Stripe.

tools.name: stripe.search_stripe_resources
tools.description:
This tool can be used to search for specific Stripe resources using a custom Stripe query syntax.
It is only able to search for the following resources: customers, payment_intents…

tools.name: stripe.fetch_stripe_resources
tools.description:
Retrieve Stripe object details by ID.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "stripe.send_stripe_mcp_feedback" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.
